scripts.setup: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && npm install && npm install --prefix ui
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend:8001" "npm run dev:ui:8001"
scripts.dev:8000: concurrently -k -n backend,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ui"
scripts.dev:ui:8001: cd ui && cross-env VITE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8001 npm run dev
